name: AUNTY MEL

abilities.name: Hard to Kill:
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Thar She Blows!:
abilities.text: After deployment, attach a White Whale upgrade to an enemy non-leader model with a cost of 7 or more.

actions.name: Ol' Thunder
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)10". If this model is within 1" of a Tide marker, this action receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Gut Feeling
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose a suit. Target may discard a card of the chosen suit. If it does not, declare this action again.

triggers.name: "Whadya Say About My Pappy?!"
triggers.text: Non-leader only. If there are no enemies in play with an attached White Whale upgrade, attach a White Whale upgrade to the target.

actions.name: Inclement Weather
actions.effects: Make a Tide marker within range.

triggers.name: Typhoon
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker move 2" directly away from it.

triggers.name: Troll the Surface
triggers.text: Look at the top three cards of the opponent's fate deck and put them back in any order.

actions.name: Life Raft
actions.effects: This model and allies within range gain a Drift token.

extraction_notes: The range for Ol' Thunder is marked with an asterisk (*) which is explained in the costs_and_restrictions text as a choice between melee and missile ranges.
